underlying_goal: Optimize OpenSearch neural search configuration and embedding text construction for best quality e-commerce product recommendations using all-distilroberta-v1 model
brief_summary: User wanted to optimize OpenSearch knn_vector parameters and embedding text construction for their e-commerce recommendation system using all-distilroberta-v1, and Claude correctly identified wrong space_type, improved HNSW params, updated text building logic, and explained token limits.
